creator: fabien.amelinck+freebsd@advens.fr
text:
The patch has been deleted after a merge upstream (https://github.com/latchset/jose/pull/153/files)

But the issue reappeared with lld 19.

> Checking if "-Wl,--version-script=..." links: NO
....
> cc: error: unknown argument: '-export-symbols-regex=^jose_.*'

I will open another bug.
